filesModified.purpose: Added presetFilters to type definition, VARIATION_TAXONOMIES map, useSelect for taxonomy terms, Preset Filters PanelBody with FormTokenField per taxonomy, useEffect to clear presets when blockVariation changes

Added @var array $presetFilters docblock, preset filter fallback logic (URL params override presets), data-preset-filters attribute on section, conditional hide of active filter bar when displayFilters is false
Read presetFilters from data attribute on init, fall back to presets in loadFiltersFromUrl when no URL params, call buildButtons() on page load to populate active filter pills

warnings: react-hooks/exhaustive-deps on useEffect (setAttributes) - matches pattern in other blocks, not a functional issue
react-hooks/exhaustive-deps on useSelect (taxonomyNames) - array derived from blockVariation, dep on blockVariation is correct

syncStatus.notes: Root wrapper mismatch warning is a pre-existing false positive: validator sees <BlockControls> as first element in fragment, but actual rendered wrapper is <section>. This existed before this change.

newVariations: Resources Archive - Preset Filters (Filters Visible): presetFilters={"audience":["students"]}, displayFilters=true
Resources Archive - Preset Filters (Filters Hidden): presetFilters={"audience":["students"]}, displayFilters=false (no filter UI or pill bar shown)

implementationNotes: URL parameters always override preset filters per taxonomy (not merged)
Clear All clears to empty state, not back to presets
Active filter pill bar (.archive-active-filters) is suppressed when displayFilters is false even if presets are active
PHP pre-populates hidden inputs with preset values so initial pill bar renders correctly on page load
JS reads data-preset-filters JSON from section element and uses it in loadFiltersFromUrl fallback for browser back/forward navigation
buildButtons() called on page load so active filter pills reflect PHP-pre-populated hidden inputs
